title: Eger、Heves — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Eger、Hevesの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

EgerはHevesにある人口52,898の都市です。A beautiful Baroque city in northern Hungary, famous for its castle’s heroic defense against the Ottomans, the Valley of the Beautiful Women wine region, and thermal baths.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
